jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Novartis India
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
